briefing.title: Sell-Through Leader by Volume
briefing.detail: Purse Maison leads all stores in units sold MTD at 45 (₱14.07M revenue), nearly 3× Miss Manila Luxe's 83 units but at 5.5× higher avg ticket (₱179,720 vs ₱77,574), confirming premium positioning is working.
briefing.action: Protect margin on top movers (Birkin, Kelly, Picotin) — do not chase Miss Manila Luxe's volume by discounting.

briefing.title: Hermès Birkin Pricing Gap — Risk to Conversion
briefing.detail: Your Birkin 25 lowest ask is ₱1,288,000 vs market low of ₱950,000 (+35.6% premium); Birkin 30 is ₱770,000 vs market low ₱575,000 (+33.9% premium), with 16–17 competing live listings each.
briefing.action: Audit condition/hardware on the 2 highest-priced Birkins per size — if not exotic or rare hardware, bring entry-level units within 15% of market low to unlock conversion.

briefing.title: Kelly 28 Overstocked vs Market
briefing.detail: You hold 11 Kelly 28s (largest position in any hero model) with your lowest ask at ₱735,000 vs market low ₱480,000 (+53% premium) against 28 total market listings — the deepest competitive pool in the snapshot.
briefing.action: Immediately reprice 2–3 of the lower-grade Kelly 28s to ₱520,000–₱550,000 to generate velocity; hold exotics/pristine condition above ₱900,000.

briefing.title: Chanel Double Flap Jumbo — Largest Inventory Drag Risk
briefing.detail: You carry 23 Chanel Double Flap Jumbos with a lowest ask of ₱188,000 (already market floor, tied with competition) against 35 total market listings — the most crowded hero segment.
briefing.action: Halt new Jumbo acquisitions immediately; for units aged 30+ days, test a ₱178,000–₱182,000 floor on 3 units to stimulate movement before month-end.

briefing.title: Inventory Depth vs Sell-Through Ratio
briefing.detail: At 45 units sold on 1,589 inventory, MTD sell-through rate is only 2.8%; at current pace (est. ~90 units/month), months-on-hand is ~17.7 months — capital is locked in ₱285.6M of stock.
briefing.action: Set a 30-day target of 70 units sold; identify the bottom 100 SKUs by days-listed and prepare a tiered markdown schedule for items approaching 60 days.

briefing.title: Shop with K — High-Value Competitor to Watch
briefing.detail: Shop with K sold 14 units MTD at ₱411,286 avg ticket (₱5.76M revenue) with only 499 inventory — outselling Purse Maison's revenue efficiency per SKU by 2.3× and moving Hermès Constance and Birkin actively.
briefing.action: Cross-check your Constance 18 (10 units, ₱404,000 floor, at market low) and Constance 24 (₱534,500 vs market low ₱395,000) pricing — Shop with K is absorbing Constance demand.

alerts: THREAT: Shop with K generated ₱5.76M MTD on just 499 SKUs vs your ₱14.07M on 1,589 — their revenue-per-SKU (₱11,538) is 4× yours (₱8,852); they are more capital-efficient in the Hermès segment.

OPPORTUNITY: Miss Manila Luxe is the volume leader at 83 units MTD (₱77,574 avg ticket) — their 73.1% 'Other' brand mix signals an underserved mid-market; your 'Other' segment at 28.5% could be expanded with accessible Loewe/Bottega/Prada to capture spillover demand.

OPPORTUNITY: Mini Kelly (Kelly 20) — you hold 2 units at ₱1,540,000 lowest ask vs market low ₱970,000 and only 4 total market listings; if condition justifies, this is a scarce model — consider holding OR one targeted ask at ₱1,180,000 to test liquidity.

ANOMALY: Canone Bags Prime shows avg_days_to_sell of 0.0 on 8 units sold — likely same-day/reserved sales model or data artifact; monitor if they are undercutting on LV and Bottega where they appear active.

RISK: Your Constance 24 lowest ask of ₱534,500 is 35.3% above market low of ₱395,000 with 16 competing listings and Shop with K actively selling Constance — this position is stalling; reprice lead unit to ₱430,000–₱450,000.

pricing.suggestion: Your floor of ₱1,288,000 is 35.6% above market low (₱950,000); reprice 1–2 entry-grade units to ₱1,050,000–₱1,100,000 to compete in the active ₱950K–₱1.2M demand band, while holding exotic/rare hardware units at current ask.

At ₱770,000 vs market low ₱575,000 (+33.9%), introduce one competitive listing at ₱620,000–₱650,000 for a non-exotic unit to capture buyers shopping the ₱575K–₱700K range before competitors absorb them.

Largest position (11 units) in the most crowded Hermès sub-segment (28 live market listings); reprice 2–3 lower-condition units to ₱520,000–₱550,000 (vs your floor ₱735,000 and market low ₱480,000) to drive immediate velocity — hold pristine/exotic above ₱850,000.

Your lowest ask ₱534,500 is 35.3% above market low ₱395,000 with active competition from Shop with K; reprice the lead unit to ₱430,000–₱450,000 to be the credible second-lowest in market and accelerate the 7-unit position.

You are already at market floor (₱188,000) in the most saturated segment (35 listings, 23 yours); do not acquire more Jumbos — selectively test ₱178,000 on 3 aged units to clear stock, and redirect acquisition budget to scarcer Chanel models (e.g., 22, Mini).

With only 4 market listings and your ask at ₱1,540,000 vs market low ₱970,000, scarcity supports a premium — hold if condition/leather is strong, or test one unit at ₱1,180,000 to gauge demand velocity without fully conceding the premium position.
